title: Better Grinding Utils
description: I tried my best and drew fresh textures for the mod called "Mob Grinding Utils"
body:
This texture pack contains modified textures from the [Mod Grinding Utils](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mob-grinding-utils?cookieTest=1) mod. The original textures of this mod have a resolution of 64x64, so I decided to redraw them under the style of Minecraft (16x16). Texture pack does not change any sounds or gui, only blocks and items
# **Redrawed items**
![Item changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb66feef13f630a235e55f3e277d9b43f6dd2159.jpeg)
# Redrawed blocks
![f](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2c68bd0bc628df3c961b4e73aef6626a0048847.jpeg)
# What's the point of this?
My texture pack makes the textures from this mod fit the overall style of the game, as the original look quite strange when compared to the textures of the original minecraft.
